statement: A weightless cantilever beam is fixed at A (x=0), free at B (x=4 m). A uniform distributed load of 300 N/m acts downward over the left half only (from x=0 to x=2 m). A point load of 500 N acts downward at the free end B (x=4 m). Find the reactions at A.
common_student_errors: Extending the distributed load over the full beam length instead of just the first 2 m
Computing the moment of the distributed load resultant from B instead of from A
Treating the fixed support as a pin (omitting the reaction moment MA)
